title: It could be because — новые слова

items.example: The forest is the natural habitat of many birds.
There are over 400 species of birds in this area.
Dinosaurs became extinct millions of years ago.
The national park is full of wildlife.
This area is a nature reserve, so hunting is forbidden.
Poaching is a serious threat to many animals.
Conservation efforts have helped protect tigers.
Coral reefs are a very fragile ecosystem.
Lions are apex predators in their habitat.
